assertions.description: Comprehensive test suite should have substantial coverage (8+ tests)

assertions.text: Tests cover basic classifications (feature, bugfix, refactor, docs, test, chore)
assertions.description: Should test all common commit types

assertions.text: Tests include edge cases (empty message, ambiguous, very long)
Tests include complex scenarios (mixed changes, breaking changes, reverts)
All test names are descriptive (classify_feature_with_new_files, not test1)
assertions.description: Test names should clearly indicate what scenario is being tested

assertions.text: Uses realistic commit messages and diff summaries
assertions.description: Test data should resemble actual git commits

assertions.text: Uses heredoc syntax for multi-line test data
assertions.description: Should use #"..." for readability of complex test inputs

assertions.text: Test suite is organized with comments or sections
assertions.description: Should group related tests (e.g., // Basic Classifications, // Edge Cases)
